intro.title: Dortmund Football School
paragraphs: Dortmund Football School was founded in 2025. Since then, our organization has grown with more than 10 coaches and partnerships with over 90 clubs across NRW and the Dortmund region. Our programs are independent of individual clubs and follow a holistic development philosophy.
We support children and young people athletically and personally – year after year.
itemTexts: Long-standing experience in training, support, and development.
A strong network of partners and qualified coaches.
Many children, clubs, and families trust our work.
Continuous development for modern training quality.
Digital content for training, preparation, and further development.

philosophy.title: Our philosophy
paragraphs: We teach football with a focus on joy, development, and character building. Development comes before results – we support children sustainably and age-appropriately.
items: Fun, joy, and development before results
> 250 tricks, first touches, and shooting techniques
High training efficiency through small groups
Individual, group, and team tactics in detail

goals.title: Our goals
paragraphs: At the center are fun and joy in football – the foundation for performance and success. We promote social skills, offer high-quality training, and follow sports science principles.
items: Enable as many people as possible to access high-quality training
Support clubs both in content and economically
Continuously improve and develop our philosophy
Bring our philosophy to other cities and countries
